text: i.e. the daemon's in-memory `Relay` object for `nip29.f7z.io` has its local `RelayServiceFlags` missing `WRITE`, so the SDK refuses to even put the `EVENT` on the wire — the relay literally never sees it. Your own `transport.rs:65` then wraps that as `"relay rejected event: {msg}"`, which is misleading — nothing was rejected; the daemon never sent it.
